title: ononis serrata f. dehnhardtii
intro: Ononis serrata f. dehnhardtii, also known as the serrated restharrow, is a plant species within the genus Ononis. This perennial herb is native to Europe and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anthelmintic and antiseptic properties. The plant's root and leaves have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may provide health benefits such as wound healing, anti-aging, and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Ononis serrata f. dehnhardtii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
